description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular design. The exterior features a combination of black and white walls, with a prominent wooden section on one side, likely serving as a garage or storage area. Large glass windows and sliding doors are visible on multiple sides, allowing for ample natural light and a strong indoor-outdoor connection. The house sits on a neatly manicured green lawn with a striped pattern, and there is a paved area adjacent to the main entrance. The roof includes several skylights and recessed sections, adding architectural interest and functionality. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on open, functional spaces.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of black, white, and wood exterior finishes. The design is minimalist and contemporary, featuring a garage and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and a patio area with outdoor seating.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the wooden garage structure and additional windows along the side.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the garage entrance, more windows, and the paved driveway area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a focus on the back patio doors and a continuous row of windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a flush door with minimal overhang, adjacent to large glass panels and a paved patio area.
